question_en: Match the ancient names of the districts of Haryana given in Column I with their present names given in Column II: Column I (I. Sairishak, II. Kanaud, III. Kapisthal, IV. Panduprastha) - Column II (a. Sirsa, b. Kaithal, c. Panipat, d. Mahendragarh)

explanation: Sairishak is Sirsa, Kanaud is Mahendragarh, Kapisthal is Kaithal, and Panduprastha is Panipat.
